net.openhft.chronicle.core.onoes

Class WebExceptionHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.openhft.chronicle.core.onoes.WebExceptionHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ExceptionHandler
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GoogleExceptionHandler, StackoverflowExceptionHandler

    public class WebExceptionHandler
extends Object
implements ExceptionHandler

      A method to call when an exception occurs.

        public WebExceptionHandler(String propertiesFile,

    • Method Detail

      • on

        public void on(@NotNull
               @NotNull Class clazz,
               @Nullable
               @Nullable String message,
               @NotNull
               @NotNull Throwable t)
        Description copied from interface: ExceptionHandler
        A method to call when an exception occurs. It assumes there is a different handler for different levels.
        Specified by:
        on in interface ExceptionHandler
        Parameters:
        clazz - the error is associated with, e.g. the one in which it was caught
        message - any message associated with the error, or empty String.
        t - any Throwable caught, or null if there was no exception.
